data.title: Apogee Enterprises raises dividend to $0.27 per share, up 4% from $0.26. Payable on Feb 18, 2026, to shareholders as of Feb 3, 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) disclosed a rise in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.27 per share, up 4% from the prior rate of $0.26 per share. Shareholders of record as of February 3, 2026, will receive the dividend on February 18, 2026. Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) is a prominent supplier of architectural building products.

data.title: Insteel Industries reports Q1 2026 results: $159.9M net sales, $18.1M gross profit, $19.4M special cash dividend paid.
data.description: Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), a leading manufacturer of steel wire reinforcing products for concrete construction in the U.S., announced its first quarter fiscal results for 2026 as of December 27, 2025. The highlights from the quarter include a special cash dividend of $19.4 million ($1.00 per share), net sales reaching $159.9 million, and a gross profit of $18.1 million, equivalent to 11.3% of net sales.
Tech company Nocopi reveals 2025 year-end updates.

data.title: Parsons acquires Altamira Technologies Corporation, enhancing signals intelligence, space solutions for U.S. Department of War.
data.description: Parsons has recently strengthened its signals intelligence and space capabilities by acquiring a new entity. This acquisition enhances Parsons’ ability to provide advanced solutions in these areas for the U.S. Department of War. The move signifies Parsons’ commitment to expanding its expertise in critical sectors. This strategic acquisition is expected to have a significant impact on Parsons’ role in delivering cutting-edge services to support national security initiatives.

data.title: Merciv, a consumer intelligence startup, emerges to assist CPG companies with data analysis as half of the executives doubt their survival by 2030 due to lack of analysts.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, a recent study revealed that approximately 50% of Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) executives are concerned that their existing business strategies may not be sustainable in the upcoming years. The main issue facing these companies is not the lack of data but the shortage of skilled analysts who can efficiently analyze the data in a timely manner. In response to this growing demand, Merciv has launched a new service targeting businesses struggling in this area.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp (TSXV: HMMC) appoints Garett Macdonald as VP Operations & GM, strengthening leadership team.
data.description: A Canadian gold producer, Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSXV: HMMC), based in Toronto, has made significant changes in its senior leadership team by appointing Garett Macdonald as the Vice President Operations & General Manager. This move follows the company's growing status as a mid-tier producer in the industry. The appointment of Macdonald signals the company's strategic focus on strengthening its operational leadership. Hemlo Mining Corp. is a prominent player in the gold market, with growing influence and shares on the Toronto Stock Exchange Venture (TSXV).

data.title: OneMain Holdings (NYSE: OMF) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026; leading nonprime consumer credit provider.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, OneMain Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: OMF), a prominent provider of credit access for nonprime consumers, is set to disclose its fourth quarter 2025 performance prior to the market opening on Thursday, February 5, 2026. Stay tuned for the release of financial results.

data.title: AVALT in Boston names Paige Emerson as Vice President of Business Development, boosting firm's advisory relations.
data.description: A private investment firm based in Boston called AVALT has welcomed Paige Emerson as their new Vice President of Business Development. Emerson will be responsible for enhancing the firm's connections within the advisory ecosystem, as well as concentrating on generating top-notch deal opportunities. Her role will involve designing systems, providing insights, and establishing a coverage model to bolster AVALT's sourcing strategy for the future. Emerson's appointment is set to reinforce the firm's position in the industry and drive growth.

data.title: Capital Region Periodontics & Dental Implants in Albany welcomes Dr. Jacqueline LeNoir, DDS to their team of four doctors, enhancing services.
data.description: Albany, New York - On January 15, 2026, Capital Region Periodontics & Dental Implants welcomed Jacqueline LeNoir, DDS to their team, enhancing the practice's group of four skilled periodontal specialists. The addition of Dr. LeNoir aims to broaden access to advanced periodontal services in the region.

data.title: Bybit signals meme coin resurgence in Solana ecosystem, world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Dubai, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, Bybit, announced exciting opportunities for adventurous traders interested in meme coins. Bybit Alpha's latest listings have caught the attention of traders as we are two weeks into the new year of 2026.

data.title: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) to stream fiscal Q1 results conference call on Jan 29, 2026 at 5:00 PM ET. Financial results for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025 to be released after market close. Public can listen on company website.
data.description: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, on January 29, 2026, post-market close. The company will conduct a conference call at 5:00 PM ET on the same day to review the results. Interested parties can access the call and presentation slides on Beazer Homes' website.

data.title: Bitcoin's $100,000 target relies on surpassing $98,000 resistance with increased spot demand and ETF inflows.
data.description: Increased interest in purchasing Bitcoin and ongoing investments in Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) may propel the price of BTC beyond the critical level of $98,000, leading to a stable and lasting rebound.

data.title: Zelluna ASA has received approval for the publication of its prospectus, restricted to certain jurisdictions.
data.description: The information in question should not be released, published, or distributed, either directly or indirectly, in the United States, Australia, Canada, or Japan, or any other jurisdiction where such actions would be deemed unlawful.
